text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 4 

ADJUST_RSN_CD 

LABEL: Adjustment Reason Code 

DESCRIPTION: Claim adjustment reason codes communicate why a claim was paid differently than it was billed. 

SHORT NAME: ADJUST_RSN_CD 

LONG NAME: ADJUST_RSN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: 001 = Deductible amount 

002 = Coinsurance
